versions.version_description: This version adds the intro to the songs, as well as the chords for the instrumental interludes.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Little Mermaid - Part Of Your World

content:
Movie is 2 semitones lower than written here...
This version has a key change, however the movie does not. :)
NOTE: I actually play piano, so guitarists might want to revise the chords and eliminate 
"passing notes" as appropriate. I have put most in square brackets [].
I've checked it many times, but there may still be mistakes. Sorry, hope it is good 
though.

[Intro]

[ch]Cm[/ch] ([ch]G[/ch]-[ch]C[/ch] quaver bassline)

[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]
You think I'm an ignorant savage[/tab]
And you've been so many places
[tab]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
I guess it must be so[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
But still I cannot see[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
If the savage one is me[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]
How can there be so much that you don't know?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
You      don't     know ...[/tab]

[Verse 1]

[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
You think you own whatever land you land on[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
the earth is just a dead thing can claim[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
but I know every rock and tree and creature[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
has a life, has a spirit, has a name.[/tab]


[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
You think the only people who are people[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
are the people who look and think like you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
but if you walk the footsteps of a stranger[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
you'll learn things you never knew you never knew.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Have you ever heard the wolf cry to the blue corn moon[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]Em[/ch]
Or asked the grinning bobcat why he grinned?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Can you sing with all the voices of the mountain?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch] (?)
Can you paint with all the colours of the wind?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
Can you paint with all the colours of the wind?[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C/G[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
Come run the hidden pine trails of the forest[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Come taste the sun sweet berries of the earth[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C/G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Come roll in all the riches all around you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
And for once never wonder what they're worth.[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
The rainstorm and the river are my brothers[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]   [[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]]
The heron and the otter are my friends[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
And we are all connected to each other[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
In a circle in a hoop that never ends.[/tab]

(Optional Repeat Chorus)

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
How high does the sickamore grow?[/tab]
       [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]     [rit. cres.] 
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
If you cut it down then you'll never know.[/tab]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]/[ch]C#[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
And you'll never hear the wolf cry to the blue corn moon[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]F#m[/ch]
For whether we are white or copper skinned[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
We need to sing with all the voices of the mountains[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
We need to paint with all the colours of the wind.[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
You can own the Earth and still[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
All you'll own is earth until[/tab]
        [ch]Bm[/ch]        [[ch]F#m[/ch]]    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] 
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]/A [ch]D[/ch]
You can paint with all the colours of the wind.[/tab]


I am going to record it, or midi it and post on my website... i will comment the link 
i have set it up if you want to hear rhythms. :)
